api_id.description: The unique identifier of the API to be exported.

export_version.description: The version of the export format, if applicable.

include_extensions.description: Specifies whether to include extensions in the export.

output_type.description: The format of the exported API (e.g., 'oas30').

specification.description: The API specification type (e.g., 'OAS30' for OpenAPI 3.0).

stage_name.description: The name of the stage to export.
